trackedDelta: Updated f1-world-championship-2026: the Hungary GP qualifying is now its own board event (was race-only). lastUpdated bumped to 11:25Z. No entries added/removed — 23 tracked entries unchanged in shape.

failures: Minor (cosmetic): the pre-existing STATIC Hungary race event still carries a generic Viaplay /no-no/sport URL while the new qualifying event uses the deeper /formel-1-guide link — only the new event added this run is the clean one.

No hard failures: confidence:high carries 2 real source-page evidence URLs (formula1.com + racingnews365), the time is Z-anchored and independently double-verified, streaming matches the norwegian-rights F1 map, and it does not duplicate the separate static race event.

notes: Standard-tier Opus, Monday early afternoon (13:25 CEST), ~3.7h after the large 07:45Z run. This was a targeted follow-up, NOT a fresh broad fan-out: the 07:45Z run had just built TdF Femmes (9 stages) + Grand Chess Tour Saint Louis (2 events) and re-verified the whole board, so re-running the full scout fleet would have been redundant budget spend. Instead this run closed the ONE remaining prompt-mandated gap.

PRIMARY VALUE — F1 Hungary GP QUALIFYING added as its own ai-research event (Sat 25 Jul 14:00 UTC / 16:00 CEST, Hungaroring, confidence high). The research prompt explicitly mandates 'F1 weekends — qualifying is its own event, not just the race' and to confirm each session against formula1.com (not ESPN). coverage-audit.json flagged this exact gap FOUR audits running (17-20 Jul, recurrences=3, bumped low->medium): the board had carried only the Sunday race per GP. Race (Sun 26 Jul 13:00 UTC) is already on the board (static). Distinct dedupe key (different title + time) so no collision.

VERIFICATION (two independent passes): (1) own web search — formula1.com official timetable + racingnews365 both give qualifying 16:00 local Budapest (CEST) = 14:00 UTC, normal weekend, no sprint; (2) a fresh-context fact-checker subagent returned verdict:confirmed (14:00 UTC, non-sprint, race Sun 26 Jul 13:00 UTC). source-quirks ESPN-mis-dating trap avoided — dates taken from formula1.com, not the ESPN feed. Streaming Viaplay (exclusive Norwegian F1 rights t.o.m. 2029).

REST OF BOARD unchanged this run (built/verified 3.7h earlier at 07:45Z): TdF Femmes 9 stages, Grand Chess Tour Saint Louis, TdF men (2nd rest day Mon 20 Jul), CS2 (both 100 Thieves matches Wed 22 Jul), golf 3M Open, tennis Ruud Montreal date-gated, Lyn OBOS fixtures, Barcelona, athletics NM/EM. No new RSS signal (post-World-Cup wrap-up, past-tense results, transfer gossip — scout-log 'quiet').

validate-events.js: 58 events, 0 errors (2 benign timezone-bleed warnings for the multi-day chess tournaments crossing midnight in CET, unrelated to this change). Independent grader: pass, score 96, no hard failures.
